heading: Tuesday Night
text: Scattered early snow showers, mainly along and east of the Greens, otherwise clearing. Lows in the mid to upper teens, colder hollows in the lower teens. Northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then diminishing overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s north, and mid to upper 40s in the south, except around 50 in southeastern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Clear to partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30, with some lower 20s east of the Greens, and low to mid 30s in the broad valleys west. Winds light, variable to south, except from the south at 5 to 15 mph in the broad western valleys.
